## Description
Provide a summary of the changes and link to the relevant issue.

Fixes # (issue)

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Refactoring / Documentation

## Checklist
- [ ] My code matches the style guidelines of this project
- [ ] I have executed `pnpm lint` and fixed any warnings
- [ ] I have executed `pnpm typecheck` and verified zero TS compiler issues
- [ ] I have added/modified unit tests to cover my changes
- [ ] All new and existing tests passed successfully
- [ ] I have updated the documentation / guides
